snippet.title: M.A.K.E. Matthew Kenney and Blendtec
snippet.description: Matthew Kenney is a man pushing raw food cuisine into new frontiers.  Matthew is delighting taste buds worldwide in his several restaurants and is training the next generation of raw chefs in his culinary schools. Matthew has chosen Blendtec to take his business to new heights.

snippet.description:
Why does Tom make the Worlds Most Advanced Blender? Take a deeper look into the background of the one and only, Tom Dickson.

FEED YOUR PASSION with Blendtec!

snippet.title: Elf on the Shelf - Will it Blend?
snippet.description:
For years kids have had to live up to the standards of the nosy, tattle-telling Elf on the Shelf. NO MORE! A mob of angry kids have enlisted Tom and his Blendtec blender to dispose of their elf problem. The elf posses magical powers and runs with a mystical posse but can he escape the wrath of the Blendtec blender? 



Check out the blender you see in this video: http://blendt.ec/pqQ08
